pr.title: [Non-Record] Hymba-LongContext: 32K context training and eval via hybrid SSM (1.1873 BPB)

output.summary: Hybrid Hymba blocks pair sliding-window attention with recurrent Mamba SSM to train 32K-context models with constant per-token cost.
techniques: Hybrid Hymba blocks merge sliding-window attention with selective Mamba SSM per layer
Constant-cost SWA-512 plus Mamba scan support 32K-64K context without overhead
Score-first test-time training adapts the quantized model during eval
